name: solvoke-synap
description: Solvoke Synap — Cross-platform AI conversation manager. Monorepo for @synap/core + synap-web.

scripts.postinstall: npm run build:core && cd packages/web && npx prisma generate
scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:web
scripts.lint: npm run lint:core && npm run lint:web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:core && npm run typecheck:web
